economic_notes: Musqueam has significant real estate and marine business enterprises including MST Development Corporation (Jericho, Fairmont, West Vancouver lands), Block F Limited Partnership development, Willingdon Developments, LDB Developments, Salish Seas Fisheries, and Musqueam Marina. Block F Partnership had $25.3M drawn on development facilities. Housing Equalization Program with 153 participating members and $8.5M in potential credits.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Complex consolidation structure with ~29 controlled OGO subsidiaries and ~28 GBEs/GBPs accounted for by modified equity method. Investment in GBEs totals $169.2M on balance sheet. Reconciliation agreement lands of $65.1M included as non-financial assets. Prior year 2020 had forgiveness of government loans of $2.23M (one-time). Capital lease obligations of $495K also included in liabilities. CMHC loans of $6.49M are primary long-term debt. Annual debt service reflects CMHC principal repayments only; capital lease principal payments of $63,865 additional. OSR calculated as total revenue $39,785,599 minus total government transfers $14,142,379 = $25,643,220. Accounts receivable figure combines ground leases/other receivables ($4,565,587) and contributions receivable ($997,345) and other receivables.
